title: Two Peas | Project Life Video
excerpt: This week for my Project Life video series with Two Peas In a Bucket, I show you how I mix a 12x12 print from Persnickety Prints and photos that I print at home. I use Photoshop to build the collage…
body:
This week for my Project Life video series with Two Peas In a Bucket, I show you how I mix a 12x12 print from Persnickety Prints and photos that I print at home. I use Photoshop to build the collage and walk you through the process. Incorporating memorabilia each week is something I enjoy doing, so I made sure to squeeze some of that in. Enjoy the look into my process and even get a peek at how similar the events were from the same week in 2012, yet the pages came out so different. Just another reason to LOVE Project Life.

Hope you enjoy the newest Project Life video and consider joining in on the challenge!PS - I also wanted to give you a little heads up that on Monday, April 1st I have a fun mini workshop going live at Two Peas! Have a lovely weekend!
